_README: Copy this file to keys.json at the repo root and delete _README. Do not commit keys.json.

_FIELD_NOTES.cursor_api_key: Optional placeholder for Cursor product keys; the codex-only loop does not require it.
_FIELD_NOTES.openai_api_key: Optional direct OpenAI key if your tooling reads it (codex typically uses ~/.codex/config.toml).
_FIELD_NOTES.anthropic_api_key: Optional Anthropic key for non-codex tools; codex profiles usually hold model credentials.
_FIELD_NOTES.semantic_scholar_api_key: Empty = Semantic Scholar free tier (~1 RPS). Fill for higher rate limits; can also set in config.toml [lit_review].
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy: Local shim (proxy/codex_proxy.py): maps Codex Responses-style calls to your org Chat Completions endpoint.
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.listen_host: Bind address for the proxy HTTP server (default loopback).
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.listen_port: TCP port (default 4002; matches common local codex base_url examples).
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.upstream_base_url: Prefix URL for your provider before /chat/completions (see proxy/README.md).
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.bearer_token: Secret sent upstream; prefer env CODEX_PROXY_API_KEY in production.
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.fallback_models: Ordered model names the proxy may try on transient failures.
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.default_model: Default resolved model id when the client omits one.
_FIELD_NOTES.codex_proxy.model_aliases: Short name → full deployment id mapping for convenience.
_FIELD_NOTES.lark_notification: ByteDance/Lark webhook config for Sentinel alerts; disable for non-Lark setups.
_FIELD_NOTES.lark_notification.webhook_url: Incoming webhook URL or null to silence out-of-band IM.
_FIELD_NOTES.lark_notification.enabled: Master switch; false skips IM sends even if webhook_url is set.
_FIELD_NOTES.github: Optional metadata for future automation (not read by mgr core loop).
_FIELD_NOTES.github.user: GitHub username or org for scripting.
_FIELD_NOTES.github.default_repo: Canonical public mirror for this codebase.
